name: Merry Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-inch square pan with waxed paper.
2. Cover the bottom of the pan with a layer of graham crackers.
3. Mix together the butter, icing sugar, egg yolk, nuts, chopped marachino cherries, mashed banana, shredded coconut, and vanilla extract.
4. Spread the mixture over the graham crackers in the pan.
5. Top with another layer of graham crackers.
6. Drizzle with icing (if desired) and refrigerate until set.
